articles.author: Kaanita Iyer, Gianluca Mezzofiore
articles.title: Iran launched missiles at US-UK military base in the Indian Ocean. Here’s what that says about its capabilities - CNN
articles.description: Iran’s attempt to strike a US-UK base over 2,000 miles (over 3,000 kilometers) off its coast has renewed questions about Tehran’s military capabilities and how far its missiles can reach.
articles.content:
Irans attempt to strike a US-UK base over 2,000 miles (over 3,000 kilometers) off its coast has renewed questions about Tehrans military capabilities and how far its missiles can reach.
